title: Flat Effects Demo
blurb: modify_hp exact damage/heal and roll_dice fiction-only flavor rolls.

warded_vault.scene: A round stone vault, long sealed, holds three curiosities and a prize. Set into the floor is a ring of old warding runes, their angular glyphs faintly aglow — the kind of ward that lashes out at any who lay a hand on it. Beside it a cracked basin cups a thread of glowing water — a restorative font that knits exactly 8 hit points into the first wounded soul to drink, then goes dark. Against the far wall a burst strongbox spills loose coin across the flagstones — a fortune, though how much only a count will tell. At the center, on a plain plinth, rests the silver reliquary you came to claim. Nothing here stirs or threatens; the room is yours to work.
